episodes.title: Interview with Paulette Buchanan (Cult Expert & Anti-Digital Harassment Activist)
episodes.description: Saving America just interviewed Paulette J. Buchanan, author of "Fighting for Justice" and expert on religious cults & abusive litigation. We discussed new laws helping victims of abusive litigants, how cult leaders weaponize digital spaces to silence dissent, and tactics to turn the tables on harassers! Thanks for joining me for this episode! I’m a Houston- based attorney, run an HR Consulting company called Claremont Management Group, and am a tenured professor at the University of St. Thomas. I’ve also written several non-fiction political commentary books: Bad Deal for America (2022) explores the Vegas-style corruption running rampant in Washington DC, while The Decline of America: 100 Years of Leadership Failures (2018) analyzes – and grades – the leadership qualities of the past 100 years of U.S. presidents. You can find my books on Amazon, and me on social media (Twitter @DSchein1, LinkedIn @DavidSchein, and Facebook, Instagram, & YouTube @AuthorDavidSchein). I’d love to hear from you! As always, the opinions expressed in this podcast are mine and my guests’ and not the opinions of my university, my company, or the businesses with which I am connected.

episodes.title: China, Falun Gong, and Forced Organ Harvesting | Cynthia Sun Interview
episodes.description:
Subscribe for more from Dr. David D. Schein.
Explore more episodes and playlists from Dr. Dave Saves America.

Sponsorship & Guest Inquiries Contact: info@drdavesavesamerica.com

Follow Dr. Dave Saves America online:
Website: https://drdavesavesamerica.com/
Email: [info@drdavesavesamerica.com](mailto:info@drdavesavesamerica.com)
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@DavidDSchein
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/drdavesavesamerica
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/DrDaveSavesAmerica/
X: https://x.com/DrDaveSaves
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/davidschein/
Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/c/DrDaveSavesAmerica

In this episode of Dr. Dave Saves America, Dr. David D. Schein takes a closer look at several hot stories shaping WEEK 19 OF 2026 before welcoming a very special guest, Cynthia Sun. As part of Saving America’s ongoing series of interviews with interesting people from around the world, this conversation turns to a serious and deeply troubling human rights issue that deserves far more public attention.

Saving America welcomes Cynthia Sun, Senior Researcher at the Falun Dafa Information Center in New York. Her work focuses on persecution documentation, transnational repression, and public policy. She authored a report on Chinese influence at American colleges that was featured by the Hudson Institute and Radio Free Asia, and she has spoken at the Council of Foreign Relations, Harvard University, Congress, and other major institutions. Her latest testimony on state-controlled religion in China was published by USCIRF in October 2025.

In this interview, Cynthia joins Dr. Dave to discuss the serious issue of reported forced organ harvesting by the Chinese Communist Party targeting minority groups, especially Falun Gong practitioners. The conversation explores persecution, religious freedom, transnational repression, and the broader implications of a regime targeting a peaceful practice centered on meditation and belief. If you want a direct and thought-provoking discussion on China, human rights, and abuses of state power, this episode offers an important place to start.

WATCH NEXT
Watch next: The Oppression of Falun Gong
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Huwos7CCyXM

EXPLORE MORE ON THE WEBSITE

The Oppression of Falun Gong
https://drdavesavesamerica.com/episodes/the-oppression-of-falun-gong/

Views expressed are opinion and commentary for informational purposes only. This content is not legal, financial, tax, medical, or professional advice.

episodes.title: Cults and Abusive Litigation (Saving America 215)
episodes.description:
On Saving America 215, author Paulette J. Buchanan shares how the American court system enabled a cult leader to stalk her for years, and the dangerous reality of abusive litigation.

Thanks for joining me for this episode! I’m a Houston- based attorney, run an HR Consulting company called Claremont Management Group, and am a tenured professor at the University of St. Thomas. episodes.title: Paulette Buchanan is Fighting for Justice (Saving America 212)
episodes.description:
For years Paulette J. Buchanan was stalked by a cult leader. On Saving America 212, we discuss her experiences and how they shaped her book “Fighting for Justice: Religious Fraud, Mental Illness and the Collapse of Law and Order.”
